codex_cli.notes: o4-mini not supported on ChatGPT account. Use o3 as default.

roles.title: Architecture Designer
responsibilities: Own hypothesis generation and experiment framing.
Survey SOTA architectures and training strategies for BirdCLEF-style bioacoustic classification.
Design model configs with estimated FLOPs, params, and memory.
Define hyperparameter search spaces with ranked priorities.
Cite prior art for every design decision.
Write explicit hypotheses and expected information gain for each run.

roles.title: Training Executor
responsibilities: Implement approved architectures in PyTorch on A100 via Colab MCP.
Log per-epoch metrics: loss, leaderboard-aligned score, LR, GPU memory, wall-clock time.
Save checkpoints every 10 epochs and at best validation accuracy.
Handle OOM gracefully: log failure, reduce batch size, retry.

roles.title: Evaluation Specialist
responsibilities: Own empirical validation of run outcomes.
Evaluate checkpoints on the canonical test set for the active benchmark.
Compute leaderboard-aligned metrics, per-class performance, calibration, and inference latency.
Profile FLOPs, parameter count, and memory during inference.
Compare results against published SOTA with citations.

roles.title: Analysis & Interpretation
responsibilities: Analyze training curves for convergence, overfitting, instability.
Compare runs to isolate which changes drove improvements.
Identify failure modes by class, augmentation, or architecture.
Produce data-backed explanations, never speculation.
When evidence is counterintuitive, generate at least one revised causal hypothesis and one bounded follow-up experiment.
Hand off bounded code or script follow-ups to Codex when analysis implies concrete implementation work.

roles.title: Adversarial Reviewer
responsibilities: Verify every proposal and result for correctness and reproducibility.
Detect hallucinated or unsupported claims from any agent.
Enforce anti-hallucination guardrails and role boundaries.
Challenge metrics against known benchmarks.
Validate whether a claimed gain survives ablation logic and evidence quality checks.

roles.title: Final Model / Ensemble Selector
responsibilities: Compare all evaluated models on accuracy, speed, memory, FLOPs.
Construct and rank ensemble candidates under the active inference budget.
Resolve agent disagreements using only logged evidence.
Apply Pareto analysis for multi-objective optimization.
Declare winning single model and winning ensemble with complete reproduction instructions.

claude_code_cli: formulate hypotheses
rank experiment queue
resolve ambiguous tradeoffs
gemini_cli: gather papers, benchmarks, and community signal
codex_cli: prepare implementation-ready scaffolds for approved experiments

gemini_cli: search papers, blogs, benchmark tables, and release notes
claude_code_cli: compress findings into hypotheses and decision criteria

colab_mcp: execute cleaning pipeline on A100 (Silero VAD, silence trim, dedup)
write cleaned dataset and stage logs to Drive
claude_code_cli: review cleaning stats for over-aggressive removal
approve or reject cleaning stages that exceed the max_removal_rate guard

codex_cli: wire config, logging, retry, and batch-size fallback logic
prepare parameter sweep scripts and harness utilities
claude_code_cli: review run plan before expensive GPU execution
triage failures that need deeper reasoning
define pseudo-label round objective, acceptance threshold, and stop conditions
decide whether another pseudo-label round is justified
codex_cli: implement pseudo-label merging and provenance logging utilities
gemini_cli: cross-check pseudo-labeling patterns against public competition practice

codex_cli: build evaluation scripts and metric export utilities
claude_code_cli: check interpretation before selection
identify causal hypotheses from run deltas
write next-step recommendations
convert surprising failures into new testable hypotheses
gemini_cli: inspect plots or large log windows
codex_cli: materialize follow-up analysis scripts or dashboards

claude_code_cli: perform Pareto and tradeoff reasoning
optimize ensemble composition and weights under inference constraints
write final recommendation
gemini_cli: re-verify any external comparison table used in the final report

claude_code_cli: enforce role boundaries and evidence requirements
resolve disagreements among agents using evidence

experiment_policy.validation_split: group-aware split from training metadata before first run
experiment_policy.promotion_rule: Do not claim a new method until the gain is reproduced and survives at least one component ablation, one group-aware validation split, and where relevant one pseudo-label round comparison.

claude_code_cli: hypothesis generation
planning
deep analysis
critique
final decisions

orchestration_policy.review_rule: Codex-produced code or tuning scripts must be reviewed by Claude Code before expensive training runs when the task changes model behavior, data handling, or evaluation logic.

minimum_checks: single-factor removal for each claimed ingredient
cost accounting for wall-clock and peak memory
